hero.title: L+H MarketingServices – your full-service partner for market research.
hero.subtitle: From the first research question to the final report: we design, conduct and analyse studies with one dedicated team. Flexible in setup, specialised in the automotive and financial sectors and experienced in international projects.

flexibility.title: Project setups that adapt to your questions – not the other way round.
flexibility.subtitle: Every market and every research question is different. That is why we keep our structures lean and our study designs adaptable – from the first briefing to the final delivery.

tiles.title: Tailored study designs
tiles.content: Instead of forcing your questions into standard templates, we develop questionnaires, samples and methods that match your objectives and target groups.

tiles.title: Short reaction times
tiles.content: Lean structures and direct communication allow us to respond quickly – whether a questionnaire needs a late change or a timeline suddenly shifts.

tiles.title: Scalable project setups
tiles.content: From compact single-market studies to comprehensive multi-wave programmes: setups can grow or slim down as your requirements change.

flexibility.paragraph_1: Flexibility, for us, is not a buzzword but a way of working. Requirements can change during a project – additional target groups, new markets or adjusted deadlines. Because design, fieldwork and analysis are handled by one team, we can react without friction.
flexibility.paragraph_2: You always keep a direct line to the people who actually run your study. Decisions are made quickly, and changes are implemented where they occur – in the project itself.
flexibility.caption: Adaptable setups, clear responsibilities and short decision paths – throughout the entire project.

specialisation.title: Deep roots in automotive and financial market research.
specialisation.subtitle: We concentrate on the fields we know best: studies for the automotive and financial sectors – with customer satisfaction as a core discipline.

tiles.title: Automotive research
tiles.content: From product clinics to dealer and customer surveys: we support manufacturers, importers and service providers along the entire automotive customer journey.

tiles.title: Financial market research
tiles.content: For banks, insurers and financial service providers we examine how customers experience products, advice and digital channels – and what strengthens their trust.

tiles.title: Customer satisfaction
tiles.content: Satisfaction and loyalty studies are at the heart of our work: structured programmes that turn feedback from customers, dealers and employees into clear priorities.

specialisation.paragraph_1: Specialisation, for us, means mastering the whole process in-house: questionnaire design, programming, fieldwork, data preparation, analysis and reporting come from one team.
specialisation.paragraph_2: This end-to-end approach keeps quality under control and results consistent – from the first draft of a questionnaire to the final management summary.

internationality.title: International studies, coordinated from a single point.
internationality.subtitle: Markets differ, and so do respondents. We plan and manage multi-country studies so that results remain comparable without losing local nuance.

tiles.title: Multi-country projects
tiles.content: One coordinated setup instead of fragmented single studies: consistent methods, aligned timelines and central quality standards across all markets.

tiles.title: Multilingual surveys
tiles.content: Questionnaires are carefully localised so that questions work in every language and culture – a prerequisite for results you can genuinely compare.

tiles.title: Comparable results
tiles.content: Harmonised data structures and consistent reporting make it easy to compare markets, spot regional differences and derive global as well as local actions.

internationality.paragraph_1: International projects live from good coordination. We take care of translations, fieldwork management and time zones so that you can concentrate on the results.
internationality.paragraph_2: Whether two markets or many: you receive one consistent set of deliverables, one point of contact and one story that ties all countries together.
internationality.caption: One partner, one methodology – consistent insights across markets.
